markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review event progress and finalize plans for upcoming events.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Seattle Event (Nov 13):** Finalizing a contract with Fog Room for a 75+ person event. Outreach will use LinkedIn/X DMs and a strict email limit (15–20/day/sender) to protect the main `surgehq.ai` domain.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [**NYC Event:** Surge AI to review the provided speaker list by EOW to select senior targets for a private dinner. This will unlock venue site visits, which are now on a tight 18-day timeline.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [**Email Outreach Strategy:** A new strategy was adopted to prevent the main domain from being flagged as spam. The long-term solution is warming up a secondary domain, which requires a 1–3 week lead time.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
  - [**SF Events:** A Nov 21 Warriors game (30-person max) will be managed by the BD team via personal invites. A potential December VIP dinner is paused.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Seattle Event (Nov 13)

  - [**Venue:** Finalizing contract with Fog Room.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Chosen for its plug-and-play setup, including a covered patio with fire pits, which mitigates weather risk.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [**Backup:** The Collective is an option but would require bringing in F\&B, adding complexity.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [**Goal:** A large event (75+ people) requiring a broad invite list.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [**List Expansion:** Sullivan is adding Seattle-area ML engineers from Amazon and Microsoft, who were not on the initial list.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [**Outreach Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [**Problem:** High-volume cold email from the main domain risks it being flagged as spam, which would damage future business outreach.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)
      - [**Solution:** A multi-channel approach to protect domain reputation.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
          - [**LinkedIn/X:** Primary channel for automated DMs.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
          - [**Email:** Strict limit of 15–20 emails/day per sender.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
          - [**Secondary Domain:** Long-term solution. Requires 1–3 weeks to "warm up" (build a positive sending reputation) before use.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

### New York Event

  - [**Target List:** Focusing on the "Confirmed Speakers" tab of the provided list.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
      - [**Action:** Sullivan will review the list, filtering by title to select senior targets.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
      - [**Deadline:** End of next week.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)
  - [**Timeline:** The 18-day window for venue site visits and planning is now very tight.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=296.0)

### San Francisco Events

  - [**Nov 21 Warriors Game:**](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Lead:** Business Development team.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=702.0)
      - [**Scope:** Small event (30-person max) managed via personal invites (email/text), so no Luma page is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
  - [**December VIP Dinner:**](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**Status:** Paused; no action needed.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)

### NeurIPS Event

  - [**Status:** Contract signed, deposit paid.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [**Invite List:** REL is managing the primary list.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [**Surge AI's Role:** Minimal proactive outreach, as this is a low-lift co-sponsorship test.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)

### On-Site Needs

  - [**Signage:** Needed for the Nov 13 Seattle event.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [**Action:** Sullivan will coordinate with John on signage and SWAG. Lake Tahoe offered to manage the signage order if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Sullivan:**](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [Finalize and sign the Fog Room contract for the Seattle event.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [Review the NYC speaker list and tag senior targets by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
      - [Create Seattle invite copy and Luma page content (due Oct 24).](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
      - [Coordinate with John on signage/SWAG for the Seattle event.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)
  - [**Lake Tahoe:**](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
      - [Set up the Luma page for the Seattle event upon receiving content.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [**Surge AI Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [Begin Seattle outreach using the 15–20 email/day limit and LinkedIn/X DMs.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [**Mason:**](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
      - [Post on LinkedIn/X to gauge interest for the Seattle event.](https://fathom.video/share/tnhsg9FejtjXTFXodQr1sM7uo773-nvW?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
